title: Create: Sequence & Stonecutting
description: An untitled modpack about Create, enhancing the functionality of the Stonecutter and Deployer, in which the author practice his modpacking skills.
body:
//To include mod GeOre which is copyrighted, I put its link here [https://modrinth.com/mod/geore](https://modrinth.com/mod/geore)

# About The Pack
This pack is (currently) about Create, with lots of new recipes from KubeJS. A quest system guides the player from running everywhere in the world to having a creative motor in display at home. The author practices his modpacking skills on this pack, so that it is not as perfect as other packs in some places.

# 关于整合包
本整合包（目前）围绕机械动力，添加大量配方以丰富游戏内容。玩家将从砍树挖土开始，沿任务线一步步发展，最终做出一系列创造物品。本整合包也供作者Aisback2练习整合包制作工艺使用。

# Special Features
Disabled the Nether. Changed most crafting recipes resulting in the SSW(Stair-Slab-Wall) to stonecutting. Changed the obtaining of nearly all Create mechanical components to recipe sequence. To some recipes like the processing of precision mechanism, added more scrap items.

# 整合包特色
禁用下界以及传送门。将多数制作楼梯、半砖、墙的合成配方转为切石。近乎所有机械动力元件的获取方式变为序列组装。对于精密构件等配方增加了更多随机废料可能性。

# Main Mods / 主要模组
机械动力 Create | 
KubeJS | 
机械动力柴油引擎 Create Diesel Engine | 
AllTheCompressed

# Future Development
Direction A: add further challenge and reality to Create | Direction B: add more stages beyond creative items, about mods for example Mechanism or Thermal Series.

# 未来开发计划
方向A: 围绕机械动力流程添加更多挑战性与真实性 | 方向B: 在创造物品之后继续添加内容与任务，可能关于通用机械或热力模组。
